titleStmt.title: SII 18.406: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 406. (B.K. No. 44 of 1934-35.) KARŪR, RANEBENNUR TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Two pieces of a broken slab lying in front of the Hanumān temple.

summary.p: This inscription is dated in Śaka 1315, Srimukha, Kārtika Śu. 15, Sunday, corresponding to A.D. 1393, October 19, Sunday, f.d.t. ·53.

It states that Dharaṇapa-Nāyaka, son of Nāgadēva-Rāṇeya made a grant of land for offerings to the goddess [La]kkanāthi (?) dēvi of Harihara. Nāgadēva-Rāṇeya is stated to be the adhikāri of Maṁgapa-Oḍeya, son of Pādumukhi Bāvappa-Oḍeya. The grant is stated to have been made at the command and in the presence of (god ?) Hariharadēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī jayādbhudaya śakava
ruṣa 1315 neya śrīmukhasaṁva
tsarada kārttika su 15 Ā śrī matu pāḍu
mukhi bāvappaOḍeyara komāra maṁga
ppaOḍeyara Adhikāri nāgadēvarāṇaya
ra maga dharaṇapanāyaka hariharada
lakkanāthidēvige Amrutapaḍige kariUra Uru
ṁbikeṟeya modalēriya da bījavari vri
tti nāguḷada gadde beddalu ma ṟu bījavari nā
kuḷa yiṣṭanū Amrutapaḍige deU dēvate
ya Amrutapaḍiya vrittiyanū Ā�vanoba
nū pālisūdu hariharadēvara Ānugneyiṁda
Aṭṭida beṁtāyanūṟanālvaru mahājanaṁgaḷa Anu
matadiṁda śrīhariharadēvara muṁde dhārāpūrvaka
vāgi Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naḍavaṁtāgi koṭṭadharṁma yī
dhar(ṁ)mavanu Āru naḍasiyaru Avarige yipa dharmavahudu
dānapālanayōrmadhyē dānātucrēyōnrupālanaṁ dānārsvargama
vāpnōti pālanādacyetaṁ padaṁ . yī dharmma
ṁthā phalavahudu . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ
rāṁ seṣṭirvvaruṣasahasraṁhi vriṣṭāyāṁ

pūrvvadalli śrīrāmacaṁdranu bēḍi
sāmānyōyaṁ dharmmasētuṁ nru
pālanīyō bhavadbhiḥ sarvvānētāṁnbhā
bhūyō bhūyō yācatē rāma
Digital edition of SII 18.406 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
